status_breakdown.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms

events_with_summaries.title: Dept 95: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) GRS/Computer Assisted Ordering (CAO)
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 95 and Backroom: Starting May 3, Keurig Dr Pepper orders will move to system-generated ordering through GRS, aligning with standard grocery processes. Early execution is critical, as the system takes two to three weeks to stabilize, so accurate on-hands, team alignment, and not refusing orders will directly impact in-stock. This applies to KDP company-owned stores only, with reps continuing to support and adjust as needed.

events_with_summaries.title: Backroom: Join the DSD Office Hours for Real-Time Support
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Backroom: DSD Office Hours provide fast, direct support for Direct Store Delivery issues by connecting stores with key partners every other Tuesday. The next session is May 12 from 2:00 to 3:00 p.m. Central on Teams, with ongoing sessions available for continued support.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 40: New Wellness Minis Endcap Has Arrived
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: In department 40, the new Wellness Minis endcap is coming to stores in week 16, offering low cost trial size wellness items to drive impulse add ons, bringing new customers into the category, and encouraging repeat purchases as shoppers trade up to full size. Set the pre-filled display upon arrival. Insert price labels. Keep it stocked and zoned. Do not substitute items. Add aisle location for online pickup and delivery associates to locate.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 40: Pusher Kits for Upcoming Mods
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: In department 40, modular resets are beginning over the next couple of weeks which include foot care, vitamins, and digestive wellness. To make sure modulars are set to the most current planograms and deliver the best customer experience, please have teams order pushers as needed. Review the message for fixture order numbers.

events_with_summaries.title: Let the OnePay credit card make Mother's Day Extra Special \n
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Customers and associates can apply for a OnePay Credit Card and use it for Mother's Day purchases.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 23: Men’s H226 Floorplan Update
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 23: In week 15, stores will be able to preview the new Men’s H226 floorplan in the SET Tool to prepare for the upcoming layout changes. This update sets the foundation for stronger performance in Men’s Fashion by improving shop flow, expanding elevated brands and aligning layouts to current fashion trends.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 23: Team Sports Modular Update
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 23: Beginning in week 14, NFL, NCAA, NBA and NHL product will be removed from Team Sports modulars to allow for sell-down. While these categories are exiting the modular, not all items will receive markdowns immediately. Stores may continue to see select NCAA, NBA and NHL styles at full price during this period.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 29: Recall Period Company
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 29: Some boxes from the Period Company were mislabeled, so stores are asked to pull and hold impacted items until third-party Anderson re-tickets items starting May 3.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 32: Mother's Day Is a Time for Jewelry Sales
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 31: Stores should take the actions outlined in this message for a successful Mother's Day in Jewelry.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 32: Planogram Delay
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: There has been a delay of the Jewelry Planogram booklets. Stores should start receiving them at the end of this week or next week. To keep a consistent and elevated presentation in stores, use the interim merchandise guidance in this message.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: ARIH Brand Is Launching at Walmart
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: The ARIH brand launched in Walmart stores on Friday, April 24. What is the ARIH Brand? A new global Korean fusion food and beverage brand launched this month in collaboration with the K-pop group BTS. This launch is supported by four merchandising programs in select stores and online.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 92: The Great American Grill Out – Celebrating America's Birthday
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 92: To celebrate America's 250th birthday, stores will have a new and improved Grilling Train. Items will include buns, Coca-Cola and Frito Lay chips along with a selection of core condiments. Many of the items are on Rollback and will be a featured through May and June.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: Coke x Panini FIFA 20oz Sticker Program
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Walmart and Coke are partnering to promote stickers for FIFA World Cup Panini Collector Albums. Stickers will be available on 20oz Coke or Coke Zero Sugar..

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: Lay's LTO Flavors for FIFA Program
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Lay's Potato Chips is the official sponsor for FIFA and they are launching new flavors to drive sales and excitement with your customers. Stores should take action based on Saturday, May 2, feature plans.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: Q2 $1 Bin - $1 Poppi Minis
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 95: Starting week 14 (May 2-8) and running through week 26 (July 25-31), $1 poppi minis will be available in the $1 bin program.

events_with_summaries.title: Dept. 95: Summer “Flavor” 12oz 12pk Rollback $5.97
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 95: Coke 12oz, 12-pack Summer Flavors are on Rollback for $5.97. Rollback dates are from Monday, May 4 – Sunday, Sept. 20. Stores should work with their local Coca-Cola representative if they want extra displays to support Store Fulfillment and in-store demand.

events_with_summaries.title: Dpt 92: FHSC Final Week – Finish Strong
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Department 92: This is the final week of fight hunger spark change. Associates should continue to follow the program guidelines to finish strong.

events_with_summaries.title: Summer Grilling Basket Launch Plan
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: In Fresh, the Summer Grilling Basket program launches May 4 and sets through July 5, offering a family-of-8 meal solution for under $5 per person. New this year: 10 of 13 items are consolidated in one shoppable location between the frozen and refrigerated bunker endcaps and includes supporting sidekick fixtures and a 4-way to deliver a strong in-store grilling statement and elevate the customer experience!  Ensure the grilling 4-way, bunkers, endcaps and sidekicks are set to plan, items stocked, high standards are maintained and the Summer Grilling Basket signing kit is in place through July 5.

events_with_summaries.title: Associate to Driver Program: Applications Now Open
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: Total Store: Associate to Driver applications are open May 2-8. Selected associates begin training August 10 and receive a Private Fleet driver offer upon graduation. Have associates review the toolkit before applying.

events_with_summaries.title: Week 14 - Total Fresh: Prep for May Fresh Cost Inventory
events_with_summaries.status: Review for Publish review - No Comms
events_with_summaries.summary_text: May's Fresh Cost Inventory will be conducted on Tuesday, May 26. To prepare, staff up, check the Inventory Tracking Report, follow guidance provided in the Fresh Better Way guide and reach out with questions.
